title: Basic Research On Management Of Pearl Millet Diseases
abstract:
The philosophy and approach of plant disease management have k e n greatly
.influenced by the evolution of an Integrated Pest Management concept, developed
originally as an integrated control approach for insects(57). This concept has
developed into a holistic, multidisciplinary management system that integrates control
methods, on the basis of ecological and cconomic principles, for pests of all classes
that coexist in an agroecosystem(l3). Disease management is an integral part of the
crop management system and it implies that diseases are inherent components of thc
agroecosystem that must be dealt with on a continuous knowledgeable basis.
Management is based on the principle of maintain~ng( he damage or crop loss below
an cconomic injury level. Plant disease epidemics result from the conjunction of host,
pathogen, weather and time(73) and variations in any of these factors greatly
influence the course of an epidemic.
